zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Tudenham於1374年出生在英國諾福爾可奧可波洛時，他的父親Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham28歲，母親Margaret Weyland28歲。他於1392年與Margaret de Harling在英國諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1417年享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Tudenham于1374年出生在英国諾福爾可奧可波洛时，他的父亲Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham28岁，母亲Margaret Weyland28岁。他于1392年与Margaret de Harling在英国諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1417年享年43岁。

variants.name: Tuddenham
meanings: English: locative name, principally from from East or West Tuddenham (Norfolk), but also from Tuddenham (Suffolk) or Tuddenham Saint Martin (Suffolk).

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Tudenham was born in 1374, in Oxborough, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, was 28 and his mother, Margaret Weyland, was 28. He married Margaret de Harling in 1392, in East Harling, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1417, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Tudenham est né en 1374, à Oxborough, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Weyland, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Harling en 1392, à East Harling, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1417, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Tudenham 1374 in Oxborough, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham 28 und seine Mutter Margaret Weyland 28. Er hat 1392 in East Harling, Norfolk, England Margaret de Harling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1417 im Alter von 43 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Tudenham è nato il nel 1374 nel Oxborough, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Weyland, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Harling nel 1392, nel East Harling, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1417, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Tudenhamが1374年にイギリスノーフォルクオクスボロウで生まれた時，父Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenhamは28歳，母Margaret Weylandは28歳であった。1392年にイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ハーリングでMargaret de Harlingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1417年に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Tudenham(이)가 1374년 영국 노르폴크 스버루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Weyland(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1392년 영국 노르폴크 이스트 하를링에서 Margaret de Harling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Tudenham nasceu em 1374, em Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Weyland, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Harling em 1392, em East Harling, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1417, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Tudenham родился в 1374 г. в местности оксбороую, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Weyland, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Harling в 1392 г. в местности эаст харлинг, норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1417 г. в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John De Tudenham nació en 1374, en Oxborough, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John of Oxborough de de Tudenham, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Weyland, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margaret de Harling en 1392, en East Harling, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1417, a la edad de 43 años.
